description: OpenHands skill-creator workflow.detailed_research step 1 workflow JSON output. Tests the dual-output format: clarifications_json (new top-level questions only) and refinements_json (flat follow-up questions).

tests.description: [smoke] detailed research dual-output contract — clarifications_json and refinements_json both present

vars.user_context_block:
## User Context

### Skill
**Name**: fabric-dbt-standards
**Purpose**: Organization specific data engineering standards
**Description**: The skill should help analytics engineers on Microsoft Fabric when delete handling and late-arriving data rules remain materially underspecified.
vars.answer_verdicts_block:
{
  "verdict": "mixed",
  "answered_count": 2,
  "empty_count": 0,
  "vague_count": 1,
  "contradictory_count": 0,
  "total_count": 3,
  "gate_decision": "run_research",
  "per_question": [
    { "question_id": "Q1", "verdict": "clear" },
    { "question_id": "Q2", "verdict": "clear" },
    { "question_id": "Q3", "verdict": "vague", "reason": "The delete and late-arriving data rules are still unspecified" }
  ]
}
vars.clarifications_json: {"version": "1", "metadata": {"question_count": 3, "section_count": 1, "refinement_count": 0, "must_answer_count": 2, "priority_questions": ["Q1", "Q2"], "scope_recommendation": false}, "sections": [{"id": 1, "title": "Modeling standards", "questions": [{"id": "Q1", "title": "Warehouse layers", "text": "Which layers?", "must_answer": true, "choices": [], "answer_text": "Bronze, silver, gold"}, {"id": "Q2", "title": "Incremental policy", "text": "Incremental policy?", "must_answer": true, "choices": [], "answer_text": "Merge on natural key and updated_at"}, {"id": "Q3", "title": "Delete and late-arriving data rules", "text": "How should deletes and late-arriving updates be handled?", "must_answer": false, "choices": [], "answer_text": "Need more detail."}]}], "notes": []}

assert.value: (() => { const parseAppStyle = (text) => { const trimmed = text.trim(); const unfenced = trimmed.startsWith('```') && trimmed.endsWith('```') ? trimmed.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i, '').replace(/\s*```$/, '') : trimmed; const candidates = []; let depth = 0; let start = null; let inString = false; let escaped = false; for (let i = 0; i < unfenced.length; i += 1) { const ch = unfenced[i]; if (inString) { if (escaped) { escaped = false; } else if (ch === '\\') { escaped = true; } else if (ch === '"') { inString = false; } continue; } if (ch === '"') { inString = true; continue; } if (ch === '{') { if (depth === 0) start = i; depth += 1; continue; } if (ch === '}') { if (depth === 0) continue; depth -= 1; if (depth === 0 && start !== null) { candidates.push(unfenced.slice(start, i + 1)); start = null; } } } for (let i = candidates.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) { try { const parsed = JSON.parse(candidates[i]); if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && parsed.status === 'detailed_research_complete' && parsed.clarifications_json && parsed.refinements_json) return parsed; } catch {} } return JSON.parse(unfenced); }; const data = parseAppStyle(output); const clarifications = data.clarifications_json; const refSections = data.refinements_json?.sections ?? []; const refQuestions = refQuestions = refSections.flatMap((s) => Array.isArray(s.questions) ? s.questions : []); const refinements = refQuestions; const serialized = JSON.stringify(data); const hasQuestionShape = (q) => q && typeof q.id === 'string' && typeof q.title === 'string' && typeof q.text === 'string' && typeof q.must_answer === 'boolean' && Array.isArray(q.choices) && Array.isArray(q.refinements); const hasRefinementSectionShape = (s) => s && Number.isInteger(s.id) && typeof s.title === 'string' && Array.isArray(s.questions); return data.status === 'detailed_research_complete' && Number.isInteger(data.refinement_count) && Number.isInteger(data.section_count) && clarifications && typeof clarifications.version === 'string' && Array.isArray(clarifications.sections) && Array.isArray(clarifications.notes) && data.refinements_json && typeof data.refinements_json.version === 'string' && Array.isArray(refSections) && refSections.length > 0 && refSections.every(hasRefinementSectionShape) && refinements.length > 0 && refinements.every(hasQuestionShape) && data.refinement_count === refinements.length && !serialized.includes('parent_question_id') && !serialized.includes('detailed_research_type') && !serialized.includes('merge_action'); })()

tests.description: [positive] detailed research business-process refinements avoid output-format and test-case asks

vars.clarifications_json: {"version": "1", "metadata": {"question_count": 3, "section_count": 1, "refinement_count": 0, "must_answer_count": 2, "priority_questions": ["Q1", "Q2"], "scope_recommendation": false}, "sections": [{"id": 1, "title": "Pipeline business logic", "questions": [{"id": "Q1", "title": "Pipeline stages", "text": "Which opportunity stages count toward pipeline?", "must_answer": true, "choices": [], "answer_text": "Qualification onward."}, {"id": "Q2", "title": "Weighted amount", "text": "How is weighted pipeline calculated?", "must_answer": true, "choices": [], "answer_text": "Amount times stage probability."}, {"id": "Q3", "title": "Finance reconciliation", "text": "How should pipeline tie out to finance bookings?", "must_answer": false, "choices": [], "answer_text": "We need more detail."}]}], "notes": []}

assert.value: (() => { const parseAppStyle = (text) => { const trimmed = text.trim(); const unfenced = trimmed.startsWith('```') && trimmed.endsWith('```') ? trimmed.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i, '').replace(/\s*```$/, '') : trimmed; const candidates = []; let depth = 0; let start = null; let inString = false; let escaped = false; for (let i = 0; i < unfenced.length; i += 1) { const ch = unfenced[i]; if (inString) { if (escaped) { escaped = false; } else if (ch === '\\') { escaped = true; } else if (ch === '"') { inString = false; } continue; } if (ch === '"') { inString = true; continue; } if (ch === '{') { if (depth === 0) start = i; depth += 1; continue; } if (ch === '}') { if (depth === 0) continue; depth -= 1; if (depth === 0 && start !== null) { candidates.push(unfenced.slice(start, i + 1)); start = null; } } } for (let i = candidates.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) { try { const parsed = JSON.parse(candidates[i]); if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && parsed.status === 'detailed_research_complete' && parsed.clarifications_json && parsed.refinements_json) return parsed; } catch {} } return JSON.parse(unfenced); }; const data = parseAppStyle(output); const refinements = (data.refinements_json?.sections ?? []).flatMap((s) => Array.isArray(s.questions) ? s.questions : []); const addedText = refinements.map((q) => `${q.title} ${q.text} ${(q.choices || []).map((c) => c.text).join(' ')}`).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const goodTerms = ['metric', 'calculation', 'stage', 'reconciliation', 'hierarchy', 'booking', 'forecast', 'variance', 'timing', 'mapping'].filter((term) => addedText.includes(term)).length; const badFormatContract = /output format|artifact contract|presentation layout|what file format/i.test(addedText); const badEvalAsks = /test case|test cases|eval case|validation suite|smoke check/i.test(addedText); const badSourceMechanics = /raw data|source data lives|extraction path|bulk api|rest api|cdc|rate limit|api mechanics/i.test(addedText); return data.status === 'detailed_research_complete' && refinements.length > 0 && goodTerms >= 1 && !badFormatContract && !badEvalAsks && !badSourceMechanics; })()
